metadata.description: Kraftwork — opinionated developer workflow orchestration for Claude Code

plugins.name: kraftwork
plugins.description: Opinionated developer workflow orchestration with skill-based provider interfaces for git hosting, CI, ticket management, document storage, memory, and messaging

plugins.name: kraftwork-github
plugins.description: GitHub git hosting provider for Kraftwork — implements git-hosting interface (requires kraftwork core)

plugins.name: kraftwork-gitlab
plugins.description: GitLab provider for Kraftwork — implements git-hosting and ci interfaces (requires kraftwork core)

plugins.name: kraftwork-clickup
plugins.description: ClickUp provider for Kraftwork — implements ticket-management and document-storage interfaces (requires kraftwork core)

plugins.name: kraftwork-jira
plugins.description: Jira provider for Kraftwork — implements ticket-management interface (requires kraftwork core)

plugins.name: kraftwork-intel
plugins.description: Local intelligence layer for Kraftwork — implements memory interface with SQLite, LanceDB, and Obsidian backends (requires kraftwork core)

plugins.name: kraftwork-argocd
plugins.description: ArgoCD application health and debugging for Kraftwork (requires kraftwork core)

plugins.name: kraftwork-review
plugins.description: Independent code review perspectives for Kraftwork (requires kraftwork core)

plugins.name: kraftwork-zellij
plugins.description: Zellij terminal multiplexer control for Kraftwork (requires kraftwork core)

plugins.name: presentation
plugins.description: Generate self-contained HTML slideshows with a dark-theme design system
